variation_files.prompt: A close-up shot of the watch worn on a person’s wrist, positioned slightly angled to the right. The watch is set against a soft, out-of-focus background with warm, neutral tones, suggesting an indoor or softly lit outdoor environment. The wrist is partially visible, with natural skin texture and subtle shadows enhancing realism. Alongside the watch, on the same wrist, is a black braided leather bracelet with a metallic cross-shaped charm and silver-toned accents, adding a rugged, stylish contrast. The lighting is soft and diffused, highlighting the watch’s face and the texture of the bracelet without harsh reflections. The overall composition focuses on the product in a natural, lifestyle context, emphasizing wearability and aesthetic appeal.

title: Scott's Tots - Funny TV Show Graphic T Shirt

variation_files.prompt: A woman is shown from the shoulders down, wearing the graphic t shirt, standing outdoors against a textured beige wall partially covered with green ivy vines. She is positioned slightly angled to the side, with her arms relaxed at her sides, and the sunlight casts soft shadows across her body and the wall. The t shirt fits snugly and drapes naturally, with visible fabric folds and creases. The background features a mix of sunlit and shaded areas, with the ivy creating organic patterns and dappled light. The overall lighting is bright and natural, suggesting a sunny day, with a warm, slightly cinematic tone.

title: Darn Tough Tactical Boot Extra Cushion Sock

variation_files.prompt: A full-length product shot of a person’s lower legs and feet, standing in a natural, slightly angled pose. The person is wearing the sock, which extends to mid-calf, paired with a rugged, tan-colored tactical-style boot featuring laces, metal eyelets, and a thick, textured sole. The boot is worn on the right foot, while the left foot is bare, showcasing the sock alone. The background is plain white, creating a clean, studio-like environment with even, soft lighting that highlights the texture of the sock and the details of the boot. The composition focuses on the lower legs, emphasizing the fit and practical use of the sock with outdoor or work footwear.

title: Vanlison Large Sling Bag Chest Shoulder Bag Purse Backpack Crossbody Bags for Men Women

variation_files.prompt: A split-screen layout showing a person wearing the crossbody bag from two angles: front and back.
